allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,''''\); from app.database import SessionLocal, create_tables; from app.repositories import holding_repo; create_tables\(\); db = SessionLocal\(\); holdings = holding_repo.get_all_with_asset\(db\); print\(f''Holdings: {len\(holdings\)}''\); [print\(f''  {h.asset.symbol} \({h.asset.currency}\)''\) for h in holdings]; db.close\(\)")
